name: lib-caillte-reel
caption:
In Irish, caillte means 'lost'. ☘️

Every missed call is a lost job. We named the company after the thing we kill. Free missed-call audit in bio.

#trades #plumber #electrician #ukandireland #aireceptionist

cards.headline: Every missed call is a lost job.
So we built the one who never misses.
